query:
INSERT INTO stocks (companyName, ticker, currentPrice, currency, dividendYield, sector, category, ytdPerformance, marketCap, peRatio, beta) VALUES 
('Roche Holding AG', 'ROG.SW', '329.60', 'CHF', '2.98', 'Healthcare', 'Dividendenaktien', '27.44', '260B', '18.5', '0.45'),
('UBS Group AG', 'UBSG.SW', '36.94', 'CHF', '2.45', 'Finance', 'Dividendenaktien', '36.46', '95B', '12.8', '1.15')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
currentPrice = VALUES(currentPrice),
dividendYield = VALUES(dividendYield),
sector = VALUES(sector),
category = VALUES(category),
ytdPerformance = VALUES(ytdPerformance),
marketCap = VALUES(marketCap),
peRatio = VALUES(peRatio),
beta = VALUES(beta);
